title: bromus inermis var. ciliatus
intro: Bromus inermis var. ciliatus, also known as bearded chess or bearded bromegrass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Bromus inermis var. ciliatus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against bacterial infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
